name: Baked Lemon Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts to an even thickness.
2. Dust with flour, coating both sides.
3. Melt the butter in a baking pan over low heat.
4. Place the chicken in the hot butter, skin side up if not boneless.
5. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, prepare the lemon basting mixture by combining the lemon juice, minced onion, garlic, salt, and pepper.
7. Brush the chicken with some of the basting mixture.
8. Return the chicken to the pan and brush the remaining basting mixture over the top.
9. Continue baking for 30 minutes longer or until cooked through.
10. Serve with rice and a vegetable.
